plan_adherence_notes: All 7 plan steps completed faithfully. All 5 decisions (d1-d5) implemented as specified: plain render(), locale-safe toLocaleString() assertions, formatCurrency via integration only, explicit vitest imports, zero + large number edge cases. The test file structure, imports, and assertions match the plan exactly. Minor 0.02 deduction: the plan listed steps 2-6 as separate tests but the implementation combined steps 2 and 3 sensibly into distinct test cases (5 tests total vs 5 described test scenarios). All tests pass.
missed_questions: Should we assert that bucketInterval (part of MarketAnalyticsSummary type but not rendered) is correctly ignored by the component?
Should we test component behavior with an invalid/malformed lastUpdated date string (renders 'Invalid Date')?
reason: Implementation is clean and complete. All 5 tests pass. The test file follows codebase conventions (explicit vitest imports, plain render(), @testing-library/react patterns). Locale-dependent formatting is handled correctly by computing expected values with the same toLocaleString() calls rather than hardcoding strings. Edge cases (zero values, large numbers in M/K ranges) are covered. The makeSummary helper with Partial overrides is a good pattern. Research was thorough with cited evidence, and the single corrected assumption (a3) demonstrates good self-checking. Missed questions are minor and wouldn't materially change the implementation.
